description: NINTH POST-EOM-CLOSURE POLL (12.0h after prior 2026-05-05T11:09Z, on cadence). 8 EOM PREDs (PRED-077, -081, -085, -087, -088, -090, -106, -111) at d=5.96 past 'April 2026' close — STILL Step 10b day-4-7 SEVERITY MEDIUM band; per Step 10b 'no new dedicated chg-* needed — prior dedicated (chg-20260504-1106-002) stands until band transition or adjudication signal'. PRED-105 d=17.96 past 2026-04-18 close — verdict tacit_withdrawal locked; 31st consecutive byte-identical pred-105 entry on predictions.html (still PENDING/PROSPECTIVE label, no acknowledgment). Used curl -o file pattern (per prior poll's POLLER ARTIFACT NOTE), no spurious hash drift. KEY FINDING #1: MANUAL-COMMIT DROUGHT NOW 18.46d / 443.07h — 18d THRESHOLD PASSED at 2026-05-05T12:02:38Z (~11h before this poll); 33 consecutive auto-only polls (was 32); last manual a57e731 still 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z. 19d threshold pending at 2026-05-06T12:02:38Z (~12.93h from now). KEY FINDING #2: HOLD #15 NOT YET FIRED — ETA ~2026-05-06T07:30Z (~8.38h from now); 5th HOLD without registry update would set sustained-gate precedent; gate-release inversion at HOLD #15 would be CRITICAL evidence. Daily AI review file (docs/data/daily_review.json) confirms last_review_at 2026-05-05T07:27:26Z (HOLD #14), confirmed=69, prospective=10, refined=4, registry_ratio_pct=94.5 — exact match to HOLDs #10-#13 baseline; sustained-gate pattern (a) still extends. KEY FINDING #3: ECLIPSE_DAYS still 98 — pending decrement to 97 at 2026-05-06T00:00Z (~0.88h from now); cadence (1-decrement-per-UTC-day at midnight) holds. 9 commits since prior poll (ALL auto: 7 Auto-update ECM status + 2 ECM data pull = 9 auto, 0 manual). Live status_history.json 574 entries (was 567; +7 from 7 Auto-update appends — exact match); latest entry 2026-05-05T22:41:00Z (matches commit bf534aa at 22:42:05Z), ECLIPSE_DAYS=98, wins_confirmed=67 (67-vs-69 mismatch unchanged), version V51.0 (auto-pipeline internal counter unchanged). 0 source-file touches: monitor.py 9de912a8, scripts/pull_data.py aa0573fe, scripts/build_daily_review.py ceddb04f, inject_ai_layer.py 58996a0c, verify_predictions.py db947cab, generate_manifest.js 786842ed (all SHAs identical to prior polls). docs/ai_manifest.json git SHA ea66371b unchanged V51.1 last_updated=2026-04-17; docs/api/index.json byte-identical e00e85aa8907af40778096f9a138c2d6 (4056 bytes) git SHA 890fb607 last_updated=2026-04-17. Title still verbatim 'Ovoid Cavity Cosmological Model V51.1 — 69 Confirmed Registry Items'; confirmed=69, accuracy=94.5%, V51.1 unchanged; refined=4. Parameters baseline-clean (byte-identical model.html confirms 20015/8537/5733/2534 unchanged; refraction n(r) coefficient 0.20 unchanged; both 0.20 and 0.27 still appear on predictions/model — pre-existing dual context, not a parameter change). Repo description still null. Canary OTS-provenance trap UNCHANGED — same 4 pre-existing .ots files (fd9d0a8d status_history.json.ots in docs/data + root, 411ec05e proofs/predictions_manifest.json.ots, 5b9478e4 proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-06.json.ots); no new prediction-isolation file; weekly_predictions_2026-03-15.json STILL no .ots companion (~7+ weeks). Author-contact prior NOT invoked — zero published-surface change to attribute.
